title: claoxylon indicum
intro: Claoxylon indicum, also known as Kattha or Cutch tree, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Asia, characterized by its dark brown bark and yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Claoxylon indicum include its antiseptic, astringent, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, treat diarrhea, and reduce fever, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and lower cholesterol levels. Claoxylon indicum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
